source: Arkansas Board of Electrical Examiners, Administrative Rules Rule 010.13-008 - The National Electrical Code. Arkansas Department of Labor and Licensing.

amendments.summary: AFCI protection amended: Arc fault circuit interrupters (AFCIs) shall not be required in kitchens and laundry rooms. AFCI protection remains required in all other 2020 NEC-specified locations including bedrooms, family rooms, dining rooms, living rooms, parlors, libraries, dens, sunrooms, recreation rooms, closets, hallways, bathrooms, garages, and unfinished basements.
